cleavage agent: digested with Lys-C with an enzyme/substrate ratio of 1:100
instrument: analyzed on a mass spectrometer (Q-Exactive Plus)
labeling: spike-in stable isotope labeling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC) standard
reduction reagent: 5 mM DTT was added and incubated at 37°C for 1 h
reduction concentration: 5 mM DTT was added and incubated at 37°C for 1 h
